eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Elmore, ID; at 2:35 PM on JUN 13, 2026 Effective until 4:35 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: There is a brush fire in the Oasis area  moving fast and headed towards the Chapel Watch for fire ,prepare supplies and evacuate if needed
